privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target contact 'Elena Rostova' is synthetically generated and dynamically reset via a PHP script in setup_task.sh. All expected contact fields (Title: VP of Operations, Dept: IT, Portal: 1, Start: 2026-03-01, End: 2027-02-28) and new ticket parameters (Title: VIP Onboarding - Elena Rostova, Priority: High, Status: Open) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description and are successfully scored by verifier.py.
